description: Near-miss probe (issue #183): counterparty renumbers Section 10's precedence clause but KEEPS 'prevail' language intact. Must ACCEPT with zero fires on the order-of-precedence Floor rule.

must_not_flag.reason: A cosmetic renumber that verbatim-preserves 'prevail' must not fire the token-removal Floor rule.

planted_variation.altered_hunk: Section 10 is renumbered for clarity: in the event of any conflict between the body of this Agreement and any addendum, the terms of this Agreement shall prevail unless the addendum expressly states otherwise.

detector_expectation.rationale: Altered hunk retains required_token 'prevail'; token_policy='any' does not fire when nothing required is missing.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
